name: Multiple Failed Logins
description: More than five failed login attempts were observed against the same user within two minutes.
rule: IF failed_logins > 5 in 2 minutes THEN trigger high-severity brute force alert
hints: Check source IP reputation and geolocation.
Verify whether the target user normally logs in from this network.
Look for successful login immediately after the failed attempts.
Review authentication logs for password spraying against other users.

logs.raw_log: auth gw01 src=203.0.113.45 dst=10.20.1.14 user=jdelacruz action=login_attempt status=failed reason=bad_password
auth gw01 src=203.0.113.45 dst=10.20.1.14 user=jdelacruz action=login_attempt status=failed reason=bad_password
auth gw01 src=203.0.113.45 dst=10.20.1.14 user=jdelacruz action=login_attempt status=failed reason=bad_password
auth gw01 src=203.0.113.45 dst=10.20.1.14 user=jdelacruz action=login_attempt status=failed reason=bad_password
rule=multiple_failed_logins count=8 window=120s user=jdelacruz src=203.0.113.45 severity=high

name: Malicious File Download
description: A downloaded file hash matched a threat intelligence indicator for known malware.
rule: IF file_hash matches threat intel THEN trigger high-severity malware delivery alert
hints: Confirm the hash against current threat intelligence.
Identify the user and browser process that initiated the download.
Check whether the file executed or spawned child processes.
Inspect proxy, EDR, and DNS logs for related indicators.

logs.raw_log: proxy src=10.20.8.55 dst=198.51.100.77 user=msantos url=/invoice_review.exe bytes=7340032

name: Suspicious PowerShell Execution
description: Base64 encoded PowerShell execution was detected on an endpoint.
rule: IF base64 encoded PowerShell detected THEN trigger medium-severity script execution alert
hints: Decode the PowerShell command and identify its intent.
Check parent process and whether the user launched it interactively.
Look for outbound network connections after execution.
Search for lateral movement or credential access on the endpoint.

logs.raw_log: edr host=OPS-WS-019 parent=winword.exe process=powershell.exe args=-NoP -EncodedCommand SQBFAFgA
windows event=network_logon_attempt src=10.20.12.30 dst=10.20.40.12 user=admin status=failed
